question: Find the number of channels that do not run any program.
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM channel WHERE Channel_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Channel_ID FROM program);

back_translation.intent: 统计不包含在program表中的频道数量
filters: Channel_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Channel_ID FROM program)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，原始问题要求统计没有运行任何节目的频道数量，SQL反向翻译描述通过使用NOT IN子查询正确表达了这一逻辑。
